description: Determines the type and nature of the central society in a fantasy world.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the type and nature of the central society in a fantasy world.

entries.result: Village: Our story begins in a humble village, probably in the middle of nowhere

resultTranslations.en: Village: Our story begins in a humble village, probably in the middle of nowhere

entries.result: Town: This is a town, greater than a village but much smaller than a city

resultTranslations.en: Town: This is a town, greater than a village but much smaller than a city

entries.result: City: This is a city in the fantasy world, an urban center of dense population. This is the kind of place where wealth, opportunity, and danger can be found

resultTranslations.en: City: This is a city in the fantasy world, an urban center of dense population. This is the kind of place where wealth, opportunity, and danger can be found

entries.result: Nation: The Central Society focuses on the summary of an entire nation. There are cities, towns, and villages within this nation, but we're going to summarize the overall nation itself. This may mean that the Player Character is already familiar with the nation and many places within it

resultTranslations.en: Nation: The Central Society focuses on the summary of an entire nation. There are cities, towns, and villages within this nation, but we're going to summarize the overall nation itself. This may mean that the Player Character is already familiar with the nation and many places within it

entries.result: Autocracy: Whatever the size and scope of the Central Society, it is ruled by a single individual. This may be a king or other type of dictator

resultTranslations.en: Autocracy: Whatever the size and scope of the Central Society, it is ruled by a single individual. This may be a king or other type of dictator

entries.result: Aristocracy: Whatever the size and scope of the Central Society, it is ruled by an elite group such as a royal family, a merchant group, or other small and exclusive collective

resultTranslations.en: Aristocracy: Whatever the size and scope of the Central Society, it is ruled by an elite group such as a royal family, a merchant group, or other small and exclusive collective

entries.result: Religious: The Central Society is religious in nature, such as a cult or a theocracy

resultTranslations.en: Religious: The Central Society is religious in nature, such as a cult or a theocracy

entries.result: Rule of Law: The Central Society has laws, institutions to create and enforce those laws, and a distributed Democratic government

resultTranslations.en: Rule of Law: The Central Society has laws, institutions to create and enforce those laws, and a distributed Democratic government

entries.result: Military: The Central Society is highly militaristic

resultTranslations.en: Military: The Central Society is highly militaristic

entries.result: Exclusive Guild: The Central Society is a guild or collective of like-minded people within the larger society, such as a criminal organization or society of mages

resultTranslations.en: Exclusive Guild: The Central Society is a guild or collective of like-minded people within the larger society, such as a criminal organization or society of mages

entries.result: Medieval: The Central Society is patterned after medieval times, with feudal structure, knights or samurai, and other familiar medieval tropes

resultTranslations.en: Medieval: The Central Society is patterned after medieval times, with feudal structure, knights or samurai, and other familiar medieval tropes

entries.result: Maritime: The Central Society is coastal or water focused

resultTranslations.en: Maritime: The Central Society is coastal or water focused

entries.result: Species: Species and races abound in this world, with many societies focused on a species's culture. The Central Society is one of those. For instance, elves, dwarves, or fairies

resultTranslations.en: Species: Species and races abound in this world, with many societies focused on a species's culture. The Central Society is one of those. For instance, elves, dwarves, or fairies

entries.result: Harsh Land: The Central Society is highly defined by the harsh geography it's located in, such as a barren desert, high in rocky mountains, or deep in frozen steppes

resultTranslations.en: Harsh Land: The Central Society is highly defined by the harsh geography it's located in, such as a barren desert, high in rocky mountains, or deep in frozen steppes

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation
